target.title: fix(matrix): prevent gateway stop on Megolm missing-key decryption failures
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #93501 — Matrix gateway stops processing when a sender hasn't shared Megolm session keys.

## Root Cause

Two compounding issues:

1. **Excessive retries**: `decrypt-bridge.ts` retried `MEGOLM_UNKNOWN_INBOUND_SESSION_ID` failures 8 times (~2.5 min), but the keys were **never shared** — retrying is futile.

2. **Fatal cascade**: Repeated decryption failures in the Rust WASM crypto layer can trigger `sync.unexpected_error`, which `sync-lifecycle.ts` unconditionally treated as fatal, tearing down the entire gateway.

## Changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `decrypt-bridge.ts` | `MEGOLM_UNKNOWN_INBOUND_SESSION_ID` now retries at most **2 times** (other failures unchanged at 8) |
| `sync-lifecycle.ts` | New `isRecoverableSyncError()` — decryption/Megolm/transient-network errors no longer trigger a fatal gateway stop |

## Behavior

| Scenario | Before | After |
|----------|--------|-------|
| Sender never shared keys | 8 retries → sync error → **gateway stops** | 2 retries → give up → **continues processing** |
| Keys delayed in transit (OLM) | 8 retries → may recover | 8 retries → may recover (unchanged) |
| Transient network error | sync error → stop | SDK auto-reconnect |
| True fatal error (auth fail, etc.) | stop | stop (unchanged)
